title: Structure a role and inventory
description: Organize tasks, handlers, defaults, and variables into a role and map hosts through a clear inventory.
body: Steps: 1. Group related tasks into a role with the standard tasks/handlers/templates/defaults layout. 2. Put overridable values in defaults and environment-specific ones in group_vars. 3. Define inventory groups by environment and function. 4. Keep production and non-production inventories separate. 5. Verify variable precedence resolves to the intended values per host. Rollback point: before pointing the role at a new inventory group. Validation: a host resolves the expected variables and the role applies cleanly in a non-prod group first.
